covered_sentences: Friday told me many things about people of his nation and nations nearby.
Then he told me that at a great distance from his nation there lived a white man like me, and that they had killed many people.
I understood that these were spaniards whose cruelty was well known.
I asked him if he thought I could go from this island to the place where the other white man lived.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right two-panel split, 1:1 ratio. Left panel: camera at mid-height inside the camp, angled right 20°, island-dweller in medium shot on the right listening intently, companion on the left speaking with gestures; palisade timber wall in background. Right panel: camera slightly closer at shoulder height, angled left 15°, companion still speaking, now pointing toward the horizon direction; island-dweller's profile in near-foreground at right edge as partial silhouette, leaning forward interested; thought bubble from island-dweller shows a simplified European figure with a sword ("Spaniard") sketch.

Left panel: companion (black curly hair, tawny skin, goatskin jacket, shorts, barefoot) sits on the ground facing right, gesturing with both hands, face animated in storytelling; island-dweller (brown straight hair, wide-brim hat, goatskin jacket, knife-sheath, sandals) sits on a low stool across from him, elbows on knees, leaning slightly forward with attentive expression. Right panel: companion's right arm extended, pointing toward upper-right (off-frame, toward the distant mainland direction); island-dweller's right shoulder and the side of his face visible at right edge; island-dweller's thought bubble at upper-right: a simplified helmeted figure sketch labeled (pictographic only, no English text) + an ellipse suggesting "far away" with distance marks.

Scene: mature wooden-palisade island camp interior, daytime; earth cliff wall in background; storage boxes and tools at sides; both seated in the central interior area.

Light and color: warm daytime amber-gold light; interior slightly shadowed; right panel has a slightly cooler tint reflecting the somber news.

Characters: Island-dweller — brown short straight hair, goatskin wide-brim hat, goatskin short-jacket, goatskin trousers, knife-sheath on right hip, leather strap sandals. Companion — black short curly hair, tawny skin, round pleasant face, goatskin short-jacket, rough cloth shorts, barefoot. Both seated; companion's head height ~island-dweller's shoulder.

covered_sentences: He said I could, but I would need a large boat.
I began to hope that I could escape from the island with Friday's help.

covered_sentences: I taught Friday all I could about religion.
One time I asked him who made him.
He did not understand me at all.
He thought I had asked who his father was.
Then I asked him who made the sea, the earth, the hills and the woods.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Three-panel horizontal sequence. Left panel: camera at mid-height behind island-dweller's shoulder (over-shoulder view), angled left toward companion; companion in medium shot sitting across, listening. Middle panel: companion in medium-close shot, face showing confusion/misunderstanding, eyebrow quirked, head tilting. Right panel: camera pulls back to medium-wide, both men visible; island-dweller gestures broadly toward the sky and horizon, companion looking upward following the gesture.

Left panel: island-dweller (brown straight hair, wide-brim hat, goatskin jacket, knife-sheath, sandals) sits on a stool, right hand raised with one finger pointing upward ("who made you?"); companion (black curly hair, tawny skin, goatskin jacket, shorts, barefoot) sits cross-legged opposite, leaning in with attentive but puzzled expression. Speech bubble from island-dweller: simplified human silhouette + question mark + creator-hands sketch above it. Right panel: island-dweller stands and gestures broadly — left arm sweeping toward left (sea and sky direction), right arm pointing at the ground and then upward at the forest; companion tilts head back following the gesture upward, expression shifting to consideration.

Scene: mature wooden-palisade island camp interior, daytime; earth cliff wall in background; palisade timbers at sides; visible through gaps — blue sky above.
